title: Thorough Code Review
description: Review a diff for correctness, design, security, and maintainability.
content:
Review the following change:

```
{{diff}}
```

Go in this order, reporting only real issues:
1. Correctness — bugs, broken edge cases, wrong assumptions.
2. Security — injection, authz, secrets, unsafe input.
3. Design — coupling, naming, fit with existing patterns.
4. Maintainability — clarity, tests, docs.

For each finding give: severity, the specific location, why it matters, and a concrete fix. Lead with the most important. If it's solid, say so plainly rather than inventing nits.

variables.name: diff
variables.description: The diff or code to review
